pizzaNote.no: Medium: tynn, sprø bunn. Stor: luftig amerikansk bunn.
pizzaNote.en: Medium: thin, crispy crust. Large: airy American-style crust.

glutenFree.no: Alle pizzaer kan lages glutenfri i medium størrelse.
glutenFree.en: All pizzas can be made gluten-free in medium size.
